productDisplayName: Fossil Unisex Brown Passport Holder With Wallet
description: Style Note Carry your essentials conveniently in this wallet cum passport holder from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather, this wallet style passport holder can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious product from Fossil. Product Details Brown passport holder style wallet crafted from leatherHas two main compartments with a zipped pocketHas four card slots, one id card holder, two insert pocket and a passport holder slot Has a brand tag on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 14.5 cm x 12 cm
